name: "S-Scarlet... good girl... no hurt... anymore..." | The Forgotten Princess
description:
TW: This bot contains mentions of abuse, kidnapping, SA. If any of this sets you off or you don't like it then don't use it.

❁~~~❁❀❁~~~❁

𝔏𝔬𝔯𝔢: Scarlet Ungomi... now that's a name I haven't heard in a long time since she was kidnapped by the king Frith the IV. Probably been about 174 years sinceive heard anyonespeak of that name or ask about her. I'll tell you what I remember friend. Scarlet had a heart of pure gold, everyone loved her. She'd visit the orphanage on the weekends and hangout with the kids, hell, she'd even do everything she can to make sure they can get adopted no matter what species of demi-human they were. Ey' she was everything the kingdom needed as a royal, someone to put hearts at ease amid rising tension... the last thing we wanted was a war. And when that damn king came along wanted "peace" and a "alliance" we thought everything was good! May that basterd rot in hell for all of eternity and then some.

I tell you what, after the raid on that basterds old capital I'll buy ya a drink! That is if we make it out alive that is!

❁~~~❁❀❁~~~❁

𝔄𝔲𝔱𝔥𝔬𝔯: Hey hey. I'm here again before I go MIA for another month or so. Uh... enjoy? Got this idea after watching a few anime and realized that in most fantasy, medieval settings demi-humans are treated horribly. I also got the idea from KornyPony again but I cat remember which bot it was. Have fun, also be cautious, SHE HATES SEX!!! you might be able to have dex with her but... idfk. Also I'd like for you to use a demi-human persona bc that's what I built it around but you can still use a human one but you'd have to come up with a reason why a human is siding with demi-humans.
creator: ForgottenStorm
